payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It is now decided by whatever the Illuminati Streamy committee is.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Soundbiting it up in that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, man! They chose my soundbite for the end of it. I was like (explosion). Felt cool about that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's like you're an actor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's like I played a bunch of them. Also, Deus Ex came out. Mankind Divided. I am scattered throughout the game with a very harsh Russian, Eastern European dialect, as many characters, probably yelling at you or being shot in the face. So enjoy that, as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I love shooting you in the face.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hey, you know? Everyone's got a skillset. Anybody else have anything they want to announce?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're nominated for an award, Matt.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's right! We just got nominated for a Streamy. A Streamy award under gaming. Games. It's awesome!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's our first nomination.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's like the Kids' Choice Awards for adults.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But it's not. Fans don't get to vote.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Hello, and welcome back. So to get you guys caught up: our band of adventurers, Vox Machina, in raising an army, hopefully, of allies and powerful artifacts to face the Chroma Conclave, a gathering of powerful, dangerous chromatic dragons that have been tearing through the countryside of Tal'Dorei and distant Wildemount. They have recently found some information, had a close call with the Frigid Doom known as Vorugal. The white dragon flyover did not pierce through the illusionary barrier that was placed with the help of Allura, Gilmore, and Pike, there in Whitestone. You then decided to go ahead and using that cue, before the dragon returned to its current roost that it has created over the ruins of the city of Draconia, you traveled across to the continent of Wildemount. You had a meeting with the Ravenites, a rather subverted, long-enslaved offshoot species of dragonborn kin, tailless and now surviving amongst a recent winter that seems to have come with the ruin the dragon brought. You also discovered that most of Draconia and its royal elite have been slaughtered as a means of the dragon establishing its dominance and the worship of the Ravenites that survived the fall of Draconia. You made a deal with Tooma, the current clan leader of the remaining Ravenites, that you would aid in destroying this dragon, basically the master that they replaced the Draconians with when it came. However, to ensure your help there was a two-week time limit, and if you do not return before then they would see you as not keeping your end of the deal, and they would then, instead, direct the dragon towards what was going to be Whitestone until you altered her memory, which she recalls now as Emon. Anyway, before you could be finding your way home, one of the corpses upon one of the ice spire spikes outside of the dragon's new nest, Percy saw to be the remains of your long-traveled friend, Tiberius Stormwind. The party had a fateful farewell; set him to rest within the ruins of the nearby library, fallen from the islands of Draconia; said your goodbyes; and then, upon prepping a bit, plotting, and planning, found your way back to Whitestone to continue the next leg of your adventure. And that is where we begin. You have now taken some time in your own respective rooms. It's still late afternoon, going into dusk. You all took some time to yourselves within Castle Whitestone to take a short rest and ruminate over these recent events and reveals. The evening sun draws close to dusk. It is your choice which you wish to do. If you wish to spend the evening resting here and then leaving first thing in the morning, that is up to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have never cared so much about football in my entire life as I do right now. Which is saying, I don't necessarily care a lot. But definitely--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: More than it was.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Everybody send Sam a tweet. He's going to be crying at the outset of his team. Sam, a moment of silence.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think he's lighting the set on fire.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sam walked away so he wouldn't be on the same set as you were saying that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Anyone else have anything they want to talk about before we jump into the game?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No announcements until I get back, I think.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. That being the case, then let's go ahead and hop into tonight's episode of Critical Role. [dramatic music]

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. So you've all spent the majority of it in your respective rooms-- most of you in your respective rooms-- figuring out where you are as a person and where this story leads you. After an evening's rest, the next morning comes around, breakfast is already prepared by the servants in the castle, though maybe not the amount of bacon you were hoping, and easily rectified upon request. It's at your disposal. There is a tension in the city; the barrier remains up. As you're having breakfast, you can see Zahra wander in at the smell of bacon, glances over the rest of you, still holding a book at her side that she slams closed. "Oh. I'm glad to see you're all right, and you're safe. Please tell me there's more bacon."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Maybe so.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But you're ultimately right. We have nothing to lose. I love you, Vax. And I'm sorry for being me, that it took me this long to say it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (sniffles) I'm sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Me, too.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I love you. That's pretty fucking great.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That is pretty great, yeah. High five. Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I tackle her into a bit of a hug into the bed.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're already on the bed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And that's it for now.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Pan to the fireplace.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) Pan to the fireplace!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so. Vox Machina. Taking your time to mourn in your own interesting ways. What is your path of action? What is your course, going forward?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Sleeping in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Bacon.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I think we need to spend at least the night in Whitestone and get up in the morning.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "It's all right. I'm going to continue with my research, since the rest of the ziggurat clan are now scattered about or maintaining that barrier. Guess who has to do the research in the meantime?" And she rolls her sleeves up; you can see the slightly smudged dirt across her reddish skin. She's been hard at work digging around trying to figure out what the basis of this enchantment beneath the city still is.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Not for long.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: There's more coming, dear.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What she said.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She comes and sits down and spends breakfast with you guys, catching up on what has transpired and what your current plan of action is.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Zahra, it occurs to me, you come from a family with power, connections.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Kind of. Let's just say we're estranged at the moment."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, we're looking for any ally we could, and we were curious if--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You will find no allies where you're asking. Believe me, I'd be happy to offer if we could, but no."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I had a feeling. It just felt worth asking.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "I haven't seen him for a couple days. I've been underground most of the time."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I had a feeling. It just felt worth asking.

preceding_turns.text: "It's all right. I'm going to continue with my research, since the rest of the ziggurat clan are now scattered about or maintaining that barrier. preceding_turns.text: Sorry you can't be out having your fun, dear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm certain time will allow me at some point. It better. I'm going a little stir-crazy." She grabs the bacon from the table and walks out of the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is Kashaw around by any chance, as well?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm sorry, what?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Kashaw. Is Kashaw around?

preceding_turns.text: What am I missing here?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm seeing this going down. I've walked away.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM

preceding_turns.text: Okay, roll an attack roll.

preceding_turns.text: It's a one! (laughter)

preceding_turns.text: I see this going on, and I stand up on something, and I yell to the students--

preceding_turns.text: Before this happens, as you're getting up, you watch as Vax rears back, and as he throws it, (yelps) he pulls a muscle in his shoulder and it drops to the ground, and you're like (pained noises).

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Seriously?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I jump up on a chair and I yell to the students: Instructor Kashaw has instructed us that this is a drill! You are to attack that man right there, that large man, as a test of your strength and training. Now!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't kill them, Grog!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a persuasion check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, this is going to be awful. Wow. That is cruel.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 34. (laughter)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Don't get the people killed. I've been working on them for four days."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 34. (laughter)

He walks up to you, Scanlan, pats your arm and goes, "That was pretty funny."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I try.

What's your strength modifier?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I look at Vax and I go, you were just playing around, right?

preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: And in my giant state, I'm going to kick him like a soccer ball.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to dodge. Uncanny Dodge, man.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, we'll see. Go ahead and roll an attack roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's good. 32.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh. No, I didn't miss that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll a strength check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, I'm going to use another Luck and make him roll again and pick the lower of the two.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: 15 on the strength check. 25.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Got to roll again for the hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll again because he used a Luck point to force you to reroll your attack roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What was the strength roll again?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The strength was 24.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Strength check was 24. So as you peek out of the corner of your eye you hear this (heavy steps) and as you try and spin and dodge out of the way instinctually--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Uncanny Dodge!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Are you going to do your tree thing for me? Otherwise, I can walk, but it'll be a month and a half before I get to shore."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's in the letter.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's part of that listening thing, Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: He did talk for quite a while.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is there a way to enchant me so that I have his voice? And then he'll listen more closely?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He has a spell for that. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Don't answer that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you finish penning the letter, you read over it once, twice, make sure all the information is contained. You go ahead and grab the little bit of your offering of dragon scales and teeth. Present them to Kashaw. He takes the letter and reads it over. "Sure."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Should we add an NDA?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Again, please?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No mention of Whitestone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do we have a way to get him there very quickly?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What? Kashaw?

preceding_turns.text: No, we'll leave the rock here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, you've got friends, don't you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm can figure something out."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't worry about it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Steal an airship on your way back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (chuckles) "No."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right. Let's go to the Sun Tree.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA

preceding_turns.text: No. Where is that coming from?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, he definitely has a thing for you, Vax. I have a keen eye for these things.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But you can't address it. You just have to let it be. I'm not going to encourage it. I'm not interested in him.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I see it every time. He does. He smolders.

payload.raw_text: A moment passes before the door opens again and you see Gilmore there, beads of sweat down the front of his face. He's got his fuzzy purple-blue robe wrapped around him. "My sincerest apologies, I had to take care of the now morning ritual."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Shaun? Shaun! It's us. Are you home?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You hear a muffled voice in the distance within the building go, "Yeah, hold on."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did it sound like anyone we knew?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It sounded like Gilmore. He's under some sort of duress.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sounded like he was under duress?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Slightly.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is everything okay?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes. Hold on, please." And you watch as the barrier flickers for a second and restores itself, almost like a wave of energy brought what was a slowly dwindling bit of the blue energy, now restored to its full strength.

preceding_turns.text: He's got to use the privy at some point.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, he's probably squeezing one out. It's okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Shandal.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's good to camp.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's two in the morning, at this point.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Does there look like any patch of shrubs or a low point in the terrain? Cover.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can't tell from this height, unfortunately.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We mist down a little bit.

payload.raw_text: At a safe distance, you can make out some detail, and there is some lantern light on top of some of these carts. It appears that a number of the folks have set up small tents, and most appear to be sleeping. There are a few guards that are set on top of the carts with crossbows resting over their lap, keeping an eye in case anyone decides to get too close to their wares throughout the evening.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: In this world, on the ground? I love it. We haven't done it that much lately.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: We've been too used to being careful.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: In the mansion.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: So not really camping. We're glamping.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: At this hour? No. You get the sense, looking at the surroundings of the campfires, it looks like some sort of party or gathering may have transpired earlier in the evening, but most everyone have passed out at this time.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right. We'll do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, the people who are camping, what do they look like? Pretty common folk, I'm assuming?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Best you tell at this distance, the few that you can see-- because a lot of them appear to be in small tents encamped-- the few that you do make out appear to be dressed in a little more wealthy attire than the people you encountered in Shandal. You can see the gentlemen and ladies that are guarding the encampment are dressed in functional leathers with hints of hide and metal plates incorporated in the defense, but nothing that shows overt wealth or overt destitution. General mercenary guardians for a traveling caravan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Are we going to talk to any of them?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Unless there's a brazenly loud group around one of the campfires.

payload.raw_text: Welcome back, everyone! Returning from the break, Vox Machina has an evening of rest in Scanlan's magnificent mansion. You come to consciousness the following morning, stationed within the beautiful confines of this magical mansion, unaware directly of what awaits you on the other side of the doorway. However, the morning is yours. What do you wish to do?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: No, I want to go to sleep, and I'm holding on to Fenthras and thinking about everything.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Mulling over the events that recently transpired and digesting all the questions you still have.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: I gave you a lot to think about, didn't I? Sorry. (laughs)

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: I play a card game by myself.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay. As you guys have a restful night, we're going to take a break. We'll be back here in a few minutes, and we'll pick this up in the following morning as they enter the city itself. See you in a minute! [break]

payload.raw_text: So as the morning comes about, Vex, you go stretch out of your room, scratching the side of your head, messed up from sleeping wrong on the pillow, and as you walk out you hear (clicking) and look to your right and see your brother slowly slinking away from Keyleth's room.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Two ones!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: Two ones!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns_last5.text: (yelling) Yes!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: There is a god, and he hates you!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: You are so walk of shaming right now. (laughter)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The servants vanish for about ten minutes and return with a robust meal of bowls and bowls of chicken ravioli.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: "Should you need me."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right. Sorry to babble.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, yeah, no. Maybe go take a shower.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm not going to answer that. I'll see you at breakfast. And I walk away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you do. All right, as you all find breakfast, a fair prepared chicken feast, as they've been given no other instruction. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can't we change it up?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm afraid not.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Change up the food?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, maybe something other than chicken.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why? It's nutritious. It's delicious.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Ravioli!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ravioli for breakfast? All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Something with veggies?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's do ravioli. Staff?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes, Scanlan?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, they speak?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Shit, they do talk!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Could you make us some chicken ravioli?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You unlocked "Ravioli in Marquet!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: They're learning.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: They're smart. We have to kill them all!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: They're going to learn.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As you guys approach the outside of the gate, you can see seven of the guards stay behind while three, seemingly the same three that had been keeping a close eye upon your initial approach in the evening, walk up. The same man walks up, now looking a little tired; his day is probably finishing out the rest of his station here at the gate. Approaches, hand still on the side of his sheathed weapon. "So you awaken. You have rested. What is your business here in Ank'Harel?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is the ploy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is a radical shift.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We're not honest, so let's try it for once.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, let's do it. We're from Emon, we need help fighting dragons.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like that's pretty compelling.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grog, make an intelligence check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Yeah, thank you. Travis needs to make an intelligence check. Oh Jesus, it's a 12. Minus two.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have no idea what they're talking about. You find yourself instinctually nodding.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We'll just go in, big guy. We'll be fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: First chance for violence is all yours. You're the first one in.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm all in. Violence. That's what I came away with.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) We have to be careful with our word choices with him.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We head towards the gate.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (garbled) This ravioli is delicious, by the way. My compliments to the little purple men.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They're not men, but yes.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Most people you come around here, it seems a largely human population. Beyond that, you've not seen a single dwarf as you've walked through the city, but you have seen a number of dark-skinned halflings, a few half-elves. Not an elf has caught your eye since you've wandered through. You've seen a couple of tieflings that walk openly in this city, which is a rare thing from Emon. Even there, most tieflings generally are met with mistrust and prejudice in the street. Here, no one seems to pay mind or bother. You do see a few half-orcs, this team of half-orcs that are shouting out in a language that none of you understand. Some sort of sales pitch they're giving, and there's a few people gathered around them. This is a very wide variety of people that live in this city, and everyone seems to mesh together without issue or prejudice, but not one goliath has caught your eye, and you've caught the eyes of many. And wherever you walk, you can see the townspeople stop, and they don't gawk. They don't stare intently. They're more curious, but no one appears to be following you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I need a new reed for that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And here you are, amongst the Suncut Bazaar.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I whip around and see if anyone's following us?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, Dust of Tracelessness.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hammer down! 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 14. No matter where you walk, eyes are on you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I am a gorgeous man.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Thank you so much for your patronage. Anything else you would like?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Apples? Oh wow. I was looking for something a little bit more exotic. Something native to this land.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Ah, well--" She takes the apples back. "What you'd prefer, then, would be the kurrak fruit." And she pulls out what looks like a mango, but the exterior of it is very rough, with these little spines all around it. "While it is difficult to hold, crack open for a delightful flavor. It is gentle. It is like a sweet water experience."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That was very descriptive. Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Of course."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How much do I owe you for this?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "For this, that would be two silver pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Two silver. And how much, just for future reference, are the apples?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The apples would go for one silver piece apiece."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: One silver apiece. That's pretty steep. Don't worry about it. Here you go. I give her a little extra.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "An hour past sundown."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Where would you need to meet?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How about where we first met, at that same intersection, or is that too busy?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That is far too busy. It needs to be private, away."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm sort of a visitor here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "If you want a place to stay, there is Luck's Run, the casino. There are back rooms there."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: There's a casino?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hells yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "There is the Debt's Respite Inn, which has its own grasp of lowlifes. Those are probably the best bets."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's meet in a room at the casino.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The casino it is. Which room?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The red room? I'm not familiar with this casino. I'll need some guidance.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Wear a red shirt. He will find you in the casino."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. That sounds good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All right. Hour past sundown, we'll find you there."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Tonight? What time?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: He backs off, hands up. He goes, "Very well. The amount you ask, I have no specific amount. I'd have to inquire, but I would say, to be safe, bring about 200 gold pieces with you. Just in case."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Tonight? What time?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "An hour past sundown."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, sorry. I was thinking about the casino. Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "How much do you want?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god. I'm not prepared for this!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He starts looking a little untrusting.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Be cool, man. Be cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Enough to get me through a week of heavy use. I want to go on a bender.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a deception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: A billion. More than before. 35.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: How are you rolling that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He gives you a look and bends down.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I've had a rough few weeks, and I need to get away from it all and go to that place--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He gets close to your face, interrupts you, and goes, "I mean this with all due respect: Being as small a man as you are, you have to be careful."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't tell me what to do. I can take it, all right? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's just say that when I started using, I was your height. (laughter)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Scanlan takes about five minutes or so, but eventually catches up to you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's hookah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: There's hookah!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I've never tried hookah before.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You've never tried hookah?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The Earth Ashari are super into the hookah. It's really nice, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is the only thing I actually know about this continent, is that there's tobacco.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We should try it!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did Scanlan get here yet?

payload.raw_text: And he exits the room.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Oh! May I start a tab? No? Fine. Then I give, shit. (mutters) How much do I owe?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: 700. TRAVIS 700. Here's 800 gold.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: "Thank you very much, and please, do let me know if you require anything else."

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: No problems.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: He thinks a minute, then goes, "I don't know which part of the sandkheg it is, but it is taken from the usually venomous bile or spittle of the creature."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Back in the mansion, maybe.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But not when we have to do something tonight.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (slurring) What do we have to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: As charming as you two are right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to stopper it and then I'm going to put the extra bottle in the Bag of Holding.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You didn't have any?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Just these two?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) Money well spent!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I step out and find that waiter that we paid for?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you're both really cute right now, but you're useless.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I lean on Vax a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wonderful beverages you just served us. How long does that last?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Depends on how much you're drinking."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just a tiny bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Hour, maybe."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fabulous. They came with quite a price tag, didn't they?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "'It's very dangerous to harvest and create, yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I could assume. What exactly is in?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, what are they harvested from?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: 26 investigation check. Within ten minutes you've asked the right questions between a number of various street urchins and street salespersons, to be directed straight towards the Debt's Respite.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What time is it? Has the sun gone down?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you guys woke up maybe two and a half hours ago.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Day drinking! Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're maybe getting close to noon. The sun, last you saw before you got here, was close to the center of the sky.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, we've got time to kill, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We need to go find the Debt's Respite and maybe get a room.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is that where we're going to sleep tonight?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's where the Scarbearers are. We can get a room here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And your deal is this evening, yes?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we've got some time for that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: So we take off for the Debt's Respite.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Who's leading the charge for that?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, you're not. I will.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Go ahead and make an investigation check, if you don't mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Investigation. You're terrible at those.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) This is everything I wanted.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm so happy right now.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: In following the direction, you end up walking up to what looks like a rather rundown-looking establishment. The broken glass windows and missing front door lead you to think that perhaps it's been abandoned for months. Looks a little rough and ramshackle.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I wrote it down correctly, Matt.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As you approach the front door, it's partially ajar and as you push it open, you can see the inside is a whole different story. As your eyes adjust to the interior you find actually a bustling business of barhands slinging tankards across seven stained wood tables, some of the folk look rather day-drunk, similar to these individuals, though it has worn a bit off since the original sip. And most look to be various miscreants or post-work farmers taking a break. The interior is familiar and probably closer to the taverns you're used to in more of the poorer districts of Emon and surrounding cities than some of the more luxurious areas you've recently found yourselves in. Vax, Vex, and Keyleth-- actually, Keyleth, make a perception check with disadvantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: In following the direction, you end up walking up to what looks like a rather rundown-looking establishment. The broken glass windows and missing front door lead you to think that perhaps it's been abandoned for months. Looks a little rough and ramshackle.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But they said this was being guarded by the Hand of Ord. Interesting.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: My contact in the underworld said that this was a place that is a known hangout for seedy types. Right? Am I remembering that correctly?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, the guard at the front of the city told us this was one of the places that you could stay, and it was guarded.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He said it was a place you could stay, because you were asking for taverns and inns.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We have accounts from two different people, and they're two different opinions.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's like Yelp. But better. I'm going to knock. (knocking)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "She's one of our finest, and expensive because of it. But friend, she's been off for a week since her last job, so mayhaps her schedule is open. Would have to inquire. Write me a summary of your job you have for her. I'll have it delivered. Her answer may take a week or so."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well look, if you're looking to hire, you've got to explain the task then. We do have a code. Fuck what the rumors say."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I've never found anyone who doesn't have a code who lived very long to tell about it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Aye. Long enough. What's the point in living without one? That's how you end up shivved in the stomach and left to bleed in the street. What you looking to hire for?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We are looking for the one-eyed merchant warrior who wears the coat of Cabal's Ruin.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I know who you're seeking, aye. Mistress Asharru."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Mistress Asharru?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We have a name! Goddamn it.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: 30 perception? The figure is watching all of you intensely but has not moved an inch. All you've seen are the eyes move, but they've been trained on your entire group since you arrived.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Sadly, but true. We at the very least need her blessing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: While he's talking, can I keep an eye on the figure in the corner?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There are things that have been released upon this earth that will burn everything. And they will make their way here. Draconia is gone. Tal'Dorei is gone. All swaths of civilization have been wiped off the earth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We've weathered beasts. We've weathered dragons here in Emon."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Not like we've seen.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "So be it. But nevertheless, you want to hire her, you've got to write her a proposal." And he slides across a piece of parchment with a small quill about it. "I'll deliver it, and she'll get back to you when she sees fit."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Does she have a normal price?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Depends on the job you're asking. She'll set her price."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: 30 perception.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "All sorts of entertainment. There's various singers, musicians, dancers, performers. If you're looking for company there's all sorts of entertainment in that regard, of all the spectrums. If you're looking for games, probably a few months out before we get to any sort of the gladiatorial events."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We've weathered beasts. We've weathered dragons here in Emon."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Not like we've seen.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "So be it. But nevertheless, you want to hire her, you've got to write her a proposal." And he slides across a piece of parchment with a small quill about it. "I'll deliver it, and she'll get back to you when she sees fit."

preceding_turns.text: Does she have a normal price?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Depends on the job you're asking. She'll set her price."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: 30 perception.

preceding_turns.text: 30 perception? The figure is watching all of you intensely but has not moved an inch. All you've seen are the eyes move, but they've been trained on your entire group since you arrived.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I've been watching.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Could I ask, (coughs) other than gambling, what sort of entertainment can you find in this city?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "A few months until the games begin, but until then, that's about the only way you'll find bloodshed here. At least that won't lend you up in prison."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are any items allowed in the bowl, or do you have to go in bare-handed?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It depends on the sanctions of the Ord and the agreement you come to, but fisticuffs are great for the gladiatorial events, but if you're fighting to the death, sometimes it's nice to bring a blade in."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So what type of people like to participate in these duels?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The kind that got nothing to lose. The kind that got a point worth proving with their life. Those kind. Doesn't happen often. When it does happen, it's a spectacle."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is there like a lighter fight that can be found?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Arm wrestling match.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Arm wrestling or-- I don't know, what would be worse less than--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: UFC.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Less than a Bowl of Judgment?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Cup of Truth? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: A Wok of Truth, maybe.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Bowl of Wheaties.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Tablespoon of Wrath. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is really uncomfortable.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Takes a keyring out and starts fudging through the keys, pulls a few off and tosses them to you across the table. "All right, you've got it for a night."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Just to meet with her?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just to meet with her.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: As an offer of a meeting.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's not bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He takes it. He packages in in a small container, a leather container.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Did you put in there that it had to be prompt? That it had to be prompt?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And that time is of the essence.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, don't worry." (whistles) Whistles through his fingers and the figure in the wall that you'd been watching steps forward and slowly walks towards the table. Holds up the scroll, and the figure leans in. Covers his mouth and he whispers into the ear of the figure. The figure takes the scroll, gives a nod to all of you, and walks out of the tavern. "He'll deliver that to her promptly, now be on your way. 15 gold."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh yes, of course! Thank you for the rooms.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's also about 3 00 in the afternoon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Does he still have some drink in front of him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It hasn't been filled since, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, never mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Do you guys head to your rooms? Okay. You make your way up to the rooms. They're all clean, serviceable, nothing too fancy, but functional rooms. Each with two beds.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I want to check for anything unusual, if there's anything iffy about the rooms.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I would follow suit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, for the love of fucking--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Natural one?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No. Nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nine. Nothing seems to be out of place or out of the ordinary.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Obviously.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 13? Seems to be a room.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm just going to check under the beds, that's it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 29. You find dust, dead insects, a dried-out rodent husk, and that's it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Grog, you want to bunk up?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, sure. Are we going two to a room?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, there's six of us.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Well, let me show you." Over the next five minutes, she brings out all sorts of strange knickknacks. It's essentially a display from the most awkward of vintage Salvation Armies you've ever come across.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Punch and Judy box, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Except it just has this one frazzled-looking young woman standing there with long strands of curly dark brown hair. Red lips, dark eyeshadow. She's eagerly looking out with a sign in the front that reads, "Oddities and Eccentricities."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Good day.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Be pleased.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Good day."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Be pleased.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Be pleased to you as well."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm stocked up on eccentricities, but if you have any oddities for sale, I'd be very interested.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "There are many oddities at my disposal. I'm Nisaba."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Percival. Hello.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "What kind of oddities are you looking for?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Honestly, this is my first time in the city, and I'm trying to get a sense of what's available for sale and what sorts of things one would find in the city, so really, I'm interested in touring your stock, especially if you have anything exotic.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "This is for, well, a gentleman who passed through many years ago, who claimed to be a great alchemist, sold this off when he had come into a lot of debt within the city, so I made a good price. No one has really showed much interest in it."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "There are many oddities at my disposal. I'm Nisaba."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Percival. Hello.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: God, we've found a hipster.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: However, you do catch a quick flash of what appears to be some small crystalline vials that appear to be strapped to some sort of leather bandolier.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, that's interesting. What do you call that?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Well, knowing that is now a magic potion of healing and two other magical potions, that is a very valuable belt with its contents. I would sell you just the belt for five silver pieces. To include the vials, and they do come as a set, unfortunately, that would run you 275 gold pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Interesting.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Percy, what's that?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't know. It's quite nice, though, isn't it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well. Can I do a check on the other two potions to see with my potion knowledge? My potion sense?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an intelligence check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Not bad. Just straight intelligence? 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 15. They do appear to have been prepared in the way that you prepare magically enchanted vials for potions themselves, but you're not really able to make out just at a glance. You'd have to spend quite a time to make out what their nature is.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'd have to look at it. Not familiar, sorry. That looks like a health potion, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. It does look a bit--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Healthy.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's like Storage Wars. Just buy it. Who knows what's in there?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What were you hoping to unload for it?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You ask around. It looks to probably be about four hours from sunset.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I feel like I should have learned some sort of lesson here. I'm just not entirely sure what it was.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you know--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Hardly matters, I suppose.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe you'll come to it at the end of being in Ank'Harel.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hey, guys. I had a thought. You know we were all supposed to have a meeting with the king? And I haven't been paying attention if anyone's watching, and we got time to kill. Should we go have a talk with the big man?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Or at least put in for an audience.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Who knows if they'll even get to us today?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm sobering up a bit. Which we should probably do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does it seem like a long walk towards the Cerulean Palace?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Maybe a 45-minute to an hour walk.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We've got hours and hours before we have to do anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We do. It's 4 00 in the afternoon.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What time's the sun set here? Can I ask somebody?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: 24. "Let me inquire with the Grand Maven." She turns around, her armor clinking, and walks back to the palace, leaving you guys there amongst these courtyard grounds. A few moments pass before she returns, the doors opening. As she descends, next to her you see an older woman with these long, ceremonial robes that drag behind her, spilling across the stairs as she descends, seemingly dozens of gemmed bracelets that jingle as she walks with each step. She wears a tall headdress with what looks like brass quills that press behind her head and down her back. As she approaches you all, the woman earlier that you spoke to, the Hand that approached you, stays behind quietly and watches, weapon at the ready. The woman steps forward with a smile, and unlike the abrasive appearance that most of the Hand have given, she seems to be more welcoming, and gives, for the first time since you've been here, a very formal welcoming bow with her hand before her, the other hand out. Says, "Be pleased, everyone."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Forgive us for our intrusion. We come seeking an audience of J'mon Sa Ord.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Our emperor does not take meetings. My apologies, but I must ask you to leave."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We are, in fact, a group of ambassadors from the continent of Emon, from the cities of--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Continent of Tal'Dorei, city of Emon. It concerns the fate of the world.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a persuasion check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Which one?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Not that one. That one. See? Listen to me. I'm not taking credit for that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure, yeah.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Two weeks.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit, two weeks.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah. We have two weeks until we pick up from that point in the story. Next week, look forward once again to Liam running his awesome one-shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit, two weeks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Two weeks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Two weeks.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow, guys. We did a lot of strange things.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, that was a weird day.
